name: @forwardimpact/svcembedding
description: Text embeddings over gRPC — semantic representation without each product running its own inference.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Building a search feature and realizing every product is copy-pasting the same HTTP embedding call with its own error handling.
jobs.bigHire: get embeddings from a shared service without managing inference infrastructure.
jobs.littleHire: call one gRPC method instead of wiring HTTP, auth, and retries per product.
jobs.competesWith: inline fetch calls; per-product embedding wrappers; skipping semantic search entirely
